notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Oneil Cruz steals (15) 2nd base. Oneil Cruz to 3rd. Oneil Cruz advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by catcher Jesus Rodriguez.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Jung Hoo Lee singles on a soft bunt ground ball to pitcher Bubba Chandler. Jung Hoo Lee to 2nd. Jung Hoo Lee advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by pitcher Bubba Chandler.

notableEvents.label: Ryan O'Hearn reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Ryan O'Hearn reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Luis Arraez.

notableEvents.label: Spencer Horwitz GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Spencer Horwitz grounds into a double play, shortstop Willy Adames to first baseman Casey Schmitt. Ryan O'Hearn to 3rd. Marcell Ozuna out at 2nd. Spencer Horwitz out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Spencer Horwitz rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Spencer Horwitz grounds into a double play, shortstop Willy Adames to first baseman Casey Schmitt. Ryan O'Hearn to 3rd. Marcell Ozuna out at 2nd. Spencer Horwitz out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Bryan Reynolds pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Bryan Reynolds lines out to left fielder Heliot Ramos.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Jesus Rodriguez singles on a line drive to right fielder Ryan O'Hearn. Heliot Ramos scores. Matt Chapman to 3rd. Drew Gilbert to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Ryan O'Hearn reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Luis Arraez.
